features: Wonderful fruity flavour that like all children
Bubble fruit toothpaste 50ml get kids to brush their teeth
Helps protect against cavities with proper brushing
description: Product Description Toothpaste COLGATE teeth kids bubble fruit 2-5 years - 50ml details COLGATE Junior bubble fruit toothpaste 50ml get kids to brush their teeth with a flavour they'll love! Plus, it contains fluoride and helps protect against cavities with proper brushing.Fights cavities with clinically proven fluoride formula for babies and especially for babies an extra sweet on tooth enamel. Fun bubble fruit flavour that kids will love. This toothpaste is also sugar free. Directions Apply a pea-sized amount to a toothbrush, supervise brushing for two minutes, twice a day for kids aged 2-5. Safety Warning [Do not swallow, Keep out of reach of children, Supervise brushing, Store in a safe place] See more
